steps.title: Recognize the direct question
steps.content: The setup says companies have simplified packaging, then says researchers designed a study to find out something. The blank should be the question the study investigates, not a statement of a known result.

steps.title: Use question form
steps.content: A makes a declarative claim. C has inverted question word order but ends with a period. D ends with a question mark but uses declarative word order. A direct question needs both inverted word order and a question mark. The answer is B.
